name: Cheap Life Amulet — Aug Filter + Essence
description: The currency-efficient way to land a usable rare amulet with Life. Roll Magic, then Aug to fill the second mod, then check the result — only spend an Essence on items that already have a Life or Resistance mod from the magic roll. Discard the rest and start again with a fresh white base. Filters out the dead-end rolls before you commit Essence + Exalt currency to them.

steps.outcome: Magic → Magic with 2 mods (your existing roll + 1 new random).

→ IF at least one of the two mods is Life or a Resistance: continue to step 4. → IF neither is Life or Resistance: this base is a dead-end. Discard it (sell or use as currency) and get a fresh white amulet base, then restart from step 1. PoE2 has no Orb of Scouring, so you cannot revert a Magic item back to Normal — a new white base is the only way to retry the filter.
Magic → Rare. Both magic mods are PRESERVED and the essence adds its guaranteed +maximum Life mod on top. You now have a 3-mod rare (your two filtered mods + Life).
Each Exalt adds one random modifier (up to 6 total). Stop when the result is usable — you typically only need 1-2 more Exalts since you already have a strong 3-mod base going in.

notes_for_user: Best budget path. The filter step at the start means you only spend Essence + Exalts on items that are already heading the right direction — most bases get discarded after Transmute/Aug for the cost of just 2 cheap currencies. White amulet bases are cheap or self-found, so the wasted attempts cost almost nothing. Aim to keep a small stack of fresh amulet bases on hand before starting. Advanced: pair the final Exalt with 'Omen of Dextral Exaltation' (suffix-only) to lock open prefixes for later targeted mods.
